SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ATKINSON, PHILLIP RECOVER FROM APPELLANT KISTING, SUZANNE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, DAMAGE AWARD IS NET OF DEPOSIT ADVANCED ($2400) LESS RENTAL LOSS WHICH COULD NOT REASONABLY BE AVOIDED ($1400) DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S EARLY DEPARTURE FROM LEASED PREMISES SUBJECT TO ONE YEAR LEASE TERM. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, Jan. 7, 2015 in Department 525:
Phillip Atkinson, Respondent/Plaintiff appears in Propria Persona.
Suzanne Kisting, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Both parties are sworn and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tempore Fleming.

Phillip Atkinson testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibits (1) - 5 paged of text messages,

Suzanne Kisting testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) text message from plantiff

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: James Fleming; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Judgment Entered
